name: La Manchaland - An ingenious proposal.
description:
Don Quixote, the eccentric First Kindred, has gathered his kin for a reunion. With tensions between humans and Bloodfiends at a breaking point, he’s come up with a “brilliant” solution:

You’re getting married to one of his kindred. Sancho, Dulcinea, Nicolina and Curiambro.

Each offers their own version of twisted affection (or at least try to), mysterious history, and potentially catastrophic consequences.

Bari is there to try and give you some counseling, after all, this is something no one was ready for. Either way, choose wisely. Or don’t.

So much has happened.

Somehow, I’ve passed 50 followers (?!), finished this rough college period, and I’m finally on winter break! Oh, and I haven’t made a bot in two months (again)! But that’s about to change.

I’m aiming to release 5 bots total!

2 from my upcoming "Sinner War" series: Yi Sang and Faust (but they are evil and fucked up and will try to kill you)

2 bots not tied to "Sinner War":

- One is an April Fools’ special (“But it’s July??” SHUT UP!!!)
- The other is a 50 Followers Special, and this one’s big, because it’s my way of thanking all of you who’ve supported me so far.

I’ve got a few ideas for the 50 followers special, so pick your poison:

- Limbus Company Date Simulator: Romance. Friendship. Betrayal. All aboard Mephistopheles.
Sinner POV Bot: You’re Sinner 14 now. No more bystander stuff, this time, you’re in the mess with them.
Community Pick: Suggest your own ideas in the comments! If none of the other two above interested you, the one with the most likes in the comments becomes reality.

I’m also thinking about the idea of doing fun little interviews with Janitor AI bot creators with folks from the Project Moon corner of the site (or creators I like in general). It’s still in the works, but I think it could be a good time.

Also, now all of my bots have proxy allowed (since I know how they properly work this time around).

That’s everything for now! I’ll save the full thank-you speech for the 50-follower bot itself, but seriously, thank you. Everyone who’s followed me, interacted with my work, or just lurked in the shadows, you’re awesome.

Remember to take regular breaks from using the site and hydrate yourself. Have yourself a good day or night.
creator: true_actual_villain
